notes:
You need the NVidia 396.54.09 Deriver if you want use DXVK.
If you use the 410.73 you have to deactivate DXVK and use Wine3D "PROTON_USE_WINED3D=1 %command%"
You can watch my Linux Let's Play on my YouTube Channel. http://www.youtube.com/GTuxTV
title: Leisure Suit Larry - Wet Dreams Don't Dry

notes: Thx to the Developers. They have activated OpenGL in the Windows Version for us. You can use "-force-glcore" in the launch options for the game to start in OpenGL mode. This should bring the best performance and compatibility.
title: Leisure Suit Larry - Wet Dreams Don't Dry

notes: Runs perfectly "Out of the box", smoother experience with the "-force-opengl" command line.

title: Leisure Suit Larry - Wet Dreams Don't Dry

notes:
I had to disable DXVK to run the game with Mesa drivers. After that the game launched. But I do encounter distorted audio.  This could be ficed by a pulseaudio tweak. So my launch options in steam are now:

PROTON_USE_WINED3D=1 PULSE_LATENCY_MSEC=30 %command%
title: Leisure Suit Larry - Wet Dreams Don't Dry
